marketName: Paddockbox — Mobile Modular Horse Paddock Enclosure
sensorNote: Böhmer primary position: L4-P04 Hinge Assembly is the critical design differentiator — fatigue-rated fold-flat hinge joints (C1 constraint: 10,000-cycle test) plus L4-P03 Castor Assembly enabling repositioning without disassembly. BOM below is per standard 3m panel segment.

outputTypes.name: Standard Panel Segment (3m, 3-rail)
outputTypes.notes: Core production unit. 4 segments form standard rectangular enclosure. 1600 mm height, 3 horizontal rails.

outputTypes.name: Gate Segment
outputTypes.notes: 1 per enclosure. Integrated swing gate leaf with latch. Allows human/equipment access.

outputTypes.name: Wall-Hinge Variant
outputTypes.notes: Optional wall anchor bracket kit for stable-wall attachment — semi-permanent installation.

outputTypes.name: 4-Segment Rectangular Enclosure (complete)
outputTypes.notes: 4 standard segments + 1 gate segment + 4 corner connection sets. ~360 kg total [EST].

l4Subsystems.name: Panel Segment Frame (Posts + Rails)
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Post and rail section size for lateral horse load resistance

alternatives.name: S355J2 SHS 80×80×3 mm posts + SHS 60×60×4 mm rails (welded)
Aluminium RHS posts + rails (lighter, higher cost)
S355J2 CHS round tube (aesthetic premium)
S235JR SHS 60×60×4 mm posts (lower grade)
S355J2 SHS 80×80×3 mm, 1600 mm, with base plate + cap
S355J2 SHS 80×80×5 mm (heavier-duty, same profile)
Aluminium SHS 80×80×4 mm (lightweight premium)
S355J2 SHS 60×60×4 mm, 3000 mm full length
S355J2 SHS 60×60×3 mm (wall-thickness reduction)
Aluminium SHS 60×60×4 mm
S355J2 flat plate 120×80×8 mm, welded, drilled for pin connection
Cast malleable iron corner connector (purchased)

l4Subsystems.name: Gate Segment Assembly
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Gate leaf geometry and latch design (horse-proof closure)

alternatives.name: Welded S355J2 SHS gate frame with slide bolt latch and weld-on hinges
Purchased heavy-duty galvanized gate frame (Farmco / Kerbl type)
Aluminium gate leaf (lightweight, premium)
S355J2 SHS 60×60×4 mm frame + 16 mm round bar infill
S355J2 SHS frame + horizontal flat bar rungs (ranch style)
S355J2 tube barrel hinges (35 mm OD, welded to gate + post)
Purchased weld-on pin hinge (Voigt, Simonswerk)

modules.name: Gate Latch (horse-proof, ≥500 kg hold)
modules.sensorNote: Horse-safe slide bolt latch — purchased commercial heavy-duty component. Critical: horses learn to open simple latches.

alternatives.name: Purchased heavy-duty slide bolt latch (galvanized, horse-safe)
Hook-and-eye latch with secondary safety pin
Spring-loaded lever latch (commercial paddock hardware)

l4Subsystems.name: Castor / Wheel Assembly
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Castor load rating and terrain capability (outdoor mud/gravel)

alternatives.name: Heavy-duty swivel castor 200 mm PU wheel + foot brake (×2 per segment)
Fixed-wheel with swivel at corners only (4 per enclosure)
No castors — static floor pins (non-mobile variant)

modules.name: Heavy-Duty Swivel Castor with Foot Brake (×2 per segment) — Böhmer Anchor
modules.sensorNote: Böhmer anchor: ≥400 kg load per castor (≥800 kg lateral load per post), 200 mm wheel dia., outdoor-rated for mud/gravel. Repositioning without disassembly is the Paddockbox primary differentiator.

alternatives.name: 200 mm PU swivel castor with foot brake (≥400 kg), bolt-on top plate
200 mm rubber swivel castor without brake (lower cost)
150 mm PU castor (lighter-duty, lower cost)
M12×30 galvanized 8.8 bolt + Nyloc nut + flat washer set (4 per castor)
M12×30 stainless A2 bolt set (premium corrosion)

l4Subsystems.name: Hinge Assembly — Fold-Flat Posts
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Fatigue weld specification and pin retention design (C1: 10,000-cycle requirement)

alternatives.name: Custom S355J2 barrel hinge with fatigue-rated weld and drop-in locking pin
Purchased agricultural pin hinge (Simonswerk HV series)
Fixed welded post — no fold-flat (static configuration only)

modules.name: Hinge Joint (fatigue-rated weld) — Critical Constraint C1
modules.sensorNote: Böhmer anchor: fold-flat post enables storage and compact repositioning. Hinge weld is primary fatigue risk — WPS qualification and 10,000-cycle test mandatory per C1 constraint. Full-penetration weld or fillet weld ≥0.7× tube wall thickness required.

alternatives.name: Custom S355J2 barrel hinge (40 mm OD, fatigue-rated WPS weld)
Purchased heavy-duty pin hinge plate (weld-on)
Forged barrel hinge (higher cost, proven fatigue life)

modules.name: Post Locking Mechanism (upright position)
modules.sensorNote: Drop-in locking pin through aligned holes when post is upright. Chain retainer prevents pin loss in field.

alternatives.name: S355J2 drop-in locking pin 16 mm + receiver tube + retention chain
Spring-loaded pin (purchased — Norelem, Elesa+Ganter)

l4Subsystems.name: Segment Connection Hardware
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Pin vs. bolt connection — speed of reconfiguration

alternatives.name: S355J2 galvanized 20 mm dia. pin + R-clip (quick-release)
M20 bolt + flanged nut (higher torque, no reconfiguration)
Snap pin / clevis pin (commercial equestrian hardware)

modules.name: Corner Connection Pin Set (per connection)
modules.sensorNote: Quick-release pin design allows enclosure reconfiguration without tools — key operational benefit for Reitstall customers.

alternatives.name: 20 mm dia. pin + stainless R-clip + optional alignment sleeve
Clevis pin with linchpin (standard agricultural hardware)

l4Subsystems.name: Wall-Hinge Mounting Kit (Optional)
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Wall anchor design for masonry vs. steel structure

alternatives.name: S355J2 welded bracket + chemical anchor bolts (masonry wall)
Clamping bracket for existing steel structure (no drilling)

modules.name: Wall Anchor Plate + Hinge Pin
modules.sensorNote: Optional kit for semi-permanent wall-attached installation variant. Adds anchor point so enclosure can be used as a swing-open paddock addition.

alternatives.name: Laser-cut S355J2 anchor plate + hinge pin + chemical fixings
Purchased weld-on hinge plate (standard agricultural bracket)

l4Subsystems.name: Surface Treatment (Outsourced Service)
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Hot-dip galvanizing — same specification as Heuraufe

alternatives.name: Hot-dip galvanizing ISO 1461 + powder topcoat (outsourced)
Hot-dip galvanizing only
Sherardizing / thermal spray zinc (alternative for complex geometry)

modules.name: Hot-Dip Galvanizing (ISO 1461) — Note: Castor Threads Must Be Masked
modules.sensorNote: Castor socket plates must have threaded holes masked with plugs before galvanizing to prevent zinc build-up blocking castor bolt thread engagement.

alternatives.name: Batch hot-dip galvanizing with thread masking protocol
Electrogalvanizing (sheet-only alternative, not applicable)

l4Subsystems.name: Hardware, Labels & Accessories
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: CE marking plate and safety instruction panel content (GPSR compliance)

alternatives.name: Galvanized 8.8 bolts + stainless A2 CE plate + Böhmer brand label
Stainless A4 bolts + laser-engraved stainless plates (premium)

modules.name: CE / GPSR Marking & Safety Plates
modules.sensorNote: CE marking required per GPSR before DACH market launch. Safety instruction plate: max horse count, usage instructions, hinge operating procedure.

alternatives.name: Engraved stainless CE plate + printed weather-resistant safety label
Laser-engraved aluminium combined plate (single piece)
